_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of target or threat cyber actors and procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack surfaces, threat actors, and applicable mitigating controls.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.512), RM-K-005 (RM, cosine: 0.503).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.593). Shared vocabulary: [actors, threat]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, knowledge, procedures, target] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct, controls] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.887, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (95.0%). "Knowledge of target or threat cyber actors and procedures." and "Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.558 ≈ STS 0.593 (gap 0.034). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [actors, threat] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [actors, threat]. DCWF-only: [cyber, knowledge, procedures, target]. WIDAI-only: [ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct, controls].
